title: Aechmea blanchetiana
taxonomy: Aechmea blanchetiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It belongs to the genus Aechmea, which is a group of epiphytic and terrestrial plants native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The family Bromeliaceae comprises over 3,000 species of plants, many of which are known for their colorful and long-lasting inflorescences. Aechmea blanchetiana is a popular ornamental plant due to its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. Within the genus Aechmea, Aechmea blanchetiana is classified as a member of the subfamily Tillandsioideae.
